fields.label: Debug mode
fields.description: Enable verbose debug logging. Disable in production (live mode).

fields.label: Link token TTL (seconds)
fields.description: How long an issued one-time link token stays redeemable. Default 900 (15 minutes).

fields.label: Conversation idle timeout (seconds)
fields.description: How long a chat's active conversation owner persists without activity before it is cleared. Default 1800 (30 minutes).
